blanks.1dc96f16:
Neurosurgical procedures carry inherent, high-level corporate and medical liabilities. By signing below, the patient acknowledges that the planned intervention involves direct manipulation of neural structures, which includes but is not limited to the following potential complications:

  • Motor, sensory, or cognitive deficits.
  • Localized cerebral hemorrhaging or severe cerebrospinal fluid leaks.
  • Accidental personality modification, total amnesia, or severe psychological volatility.
  • Other Neurological symtoms or disabilities.
Per Nanotrasen Regulation §32-CA, the Medical Department and the operating surgeon are cleared of all immediate station-bound liability provided the operating theater is maintained in a sterile state and mood stabilizers or sedatives were offered during the pre-operative window.
